creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to Oleg Gushchenkov from comment #2)

From: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tmux/tmux/master/CHANGES

CHANGES FROM 2.1 to 2.2 10 April 2016

Incompatible Changes
====================

* UTF8 detection how happens automatically if the client supports it, hence
  the:

  mouse-utf8
  utf8

  options has been removed.
----

I do not read this that the support for charsets other than UTF-8 has been removed. Instead the detection for UTF-8 might be buggy.
